highlights.text: Board Norwegian Luna in Miami. Haven priority boarding — skip the lines.
Haven Restaurant open for lunch once aboard. Reserve tonight's dinner with the concierge.
Explore your suite — butler introduction, unpack, settle in.
Check tonight's entertainment schedule with the Haven concierge.

briefings.gfTip: Haven Restaurant is always GF-safe. Alert them on your first visit.
briefings.reminder: Muster drill is mandatory — check your station card in the suite.

briefings.greeting: Happy Anniversary. Today is all about you two.

highlights.text: Bingo at 11am in Luna Theater.
Fred: NAD+ treatment 1:30pm at Mandara Spa.
Holly: acupuncture consultation 1:30pm → facial 2pm at Mandara Spa. Arrive 15 min early.
Bingo at 4pm at the Improv at Sea.
Dinner tonight: Cagney's Steakhouse — 6pm reservation.
HIKO show tonight — Deck 6 Luna Theater, left side entrance, before 7:30pm (Haven priority).

briefings.gfTip: Cagney's: alert staff to Holly's GF requirement at seating. Stick to steak and sides — confirm sauces.
briefings.reminder: It's your anniversary. Slow down. Be present.

briefings.greeting: Private island day. NCL's own paradise.

highlights.text: Harvest Caye is NCL's private island — tender port. Tenders start ~8am.
Beach, pool, waterslides, zip line all on the island. Haven beach loungers available.
Full bar and food on the island. Verify GF options with staff on arrival.
All-aboard time is critical — check Daily newsletter for exact time.

briefings.gfTip: Limited GF options on the island — bring snacks from the Haven pantry.
briefings.reminder: Tender port — allow extra time to get back to ship. Don't miss all-aboard.

briefings.greeting: Honduras. One of the most beautiful reef systems in the world.

highlights.text: Roatán is famous for snorkeling and diving. Crystal-clear water, abundant reef.
West End village is walkable — local shops, restaurants, beach bars.
Gumbalimba Park excursion if booked — parrots, monkeys, hanging bridges.
Tender port — return early. Last tender back departs ~30 min before all-aboard.

briefings.gfTip: Stick to grilled fish and rice at local restaurants. Ask about sauces.
briefings.reminder: Tender port — allow extra time back. Keep your sea pass card accessible.

briefings.greeting: Mexico. Ruins, ruins, ruins — or beach. Your call.

highlights.text: Chacchoben Mayan ruins excursion if booked — stunning jungle site, 90 min from port.
Port area has a large beach complex — pool, bars, shops, direct from dock.
Fresh seafood at the port restaurants. One of the better port food options.
Ship is docked — easy return, no tender.

briefings.gfTip: Grilled shrimp and fish tacos (corn tortillas only) are safe. Avoid flour tortillas.
briefings.reminder: Docked port — no tender stress. Still watch all-aboard time.

briefings.greeting: Best snorkeling in the Caribbean, right here.

highlights.text: Palancar Reef — world-class snorkeling. Book a boat tour at the pier if you haven't.
San Miguel town is one block from the pier. Best duty-free shopping of the trip.
El Fish Fritanga or similar local spots have excellent GF-friendly grilled fish.
Docked port — easy return. Popular port, lots of ship traffic.

briefings.gfTip: Ceviche (corn tostadas) and grilled fish are safe bets. Avoid anything battered.
briefings.reminder: Last port day. Make it count.

highlights.text: Full sea day — Haven pool deck, sun loungers, cocktails. Nowhere to be.
Casino is open — try your luck if you haven't yet.
Last chance for specialty restaurants. Any you missed? Call the concierge.
Start thinking about packing — disembarkation is tomorrow morning.

briefings.gfTip: Haven Restaurant for a relaxed lunch. Tell them it's your last sea day.
briefings.reminder: Set luggage outside suite by 11pm tonight if using ship's disembarkation service.

highlights.text: Haven guests disembark first — priority off the ship. No long lines.
Haven Restaurant open for breakfast until ~9am. Last Haven breakfast — make it count.
All luggage must be out of suite by 11pm last night. Keep carry-ons with you.
Ground transport from PortMiami. Rideshare pickup Zone A.

briefings.gfTip: Haven breakfast: full GF options available. Last chance — enjoy it.
briefings.reminder: Check under bed and in bathroom. Things hide there.
